title: SNDL Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial and Operational Results
text: SNDL Inc. announced record-breaking financial performance for 2024. The company achieved net revenue of $920.4 million for the full year, representing growth of +1.3% compared to the previous year. Gross profit also hit new records at $240.3 million, up 26.2% year-over-year. The cannabis business segment drove much of this growth, expanding 16.5% in the fourth quarter. CEO Zach George highlighted the company's progress: We are pleased with the continued progress reflected in our fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 results, as we set new records. Key operational achievements included completing the Nova Cannabis privatization, acquiring Indiva to become Canada's largest infused edibles manufacturer, and maintaining a strong balance sheet with $218.4 million in unrestricted cash and no outstanding debt. Despite operational success, SNDL reported an operating loss of $76.1 million in Q4, largely attributable to a $65.7 million negative valuation adjustment on the SunStream portfolio. However, the company achieved positive free cash flow of $8.9 million for the full year and targets $100 million in annual free cash flow within three years.
